title: The Spells Family — Javier, Lily, Linus, Eleanora
bodyText:
Powerful, quietly feared Koviz family on the outskirts of the central hub.

# Javier "Havier" Spells
Wood Elf/**Dhampir** warlock, 2,000+ years old. Strikingly handsome, crimson eyes, effortless charm. Centuries of blood-pact atrocities (Blood God patron) until **Lathander forced him underground**; in Koviz, the healer **Lily's** unshakable faith slowly reformed him. Now: leader of the **Thieves Guild (The Old Guard)** and a **secret smuggling ring**. Has a standing deal with **Ms. Judy: she supplies flesh** for his hunger.
> [!dm] Almost certainly **"Mr. S" / "Mr. Spells"** — the S-crest bag, the S-marked corpses, Trunks' connection. The smuggling ring is the delivery system for... something. Decide what.

# Mr. Spells in play (S18–21)
He stepped into the light: appeared at Varen's door for his bag (early-40s look, lean, golden-brown skin, groomed black mustache/goatee, long black-and-gold suit under a black-and-red robe). Cut a deal — **1,200g list, discounted** — after being named **chairman of F & B**; revealed he'd **tracked the party through the bag's S-mark**, then removed it. Runs a shop behind an unmarked building (cloaked escort, S on an empty wall). Gave Felson a **secret weapon** and an open **wish** offer. And the big one: **Root worked with/for him — Spells canceled Root's escape** ("Our business is over") and let the party finish it. Also: **helped Trunks create his vials** (journal).

# Lily
Human woman, 40s, of the **Children of Lathandar**. Beloved organizer of festivals/potlucks. Kept faith through the dark. The reason Javier is a person again.

# The children
- **Linus** — will become the **first artificer** (mithril / its byproduct as the key).
- **Eleanora** — vampire + warlock + **Aasimar** (Lathandar's blessed blood + dhampir blood made her sick as a child; a **patron cured her via pact** — originally to spy on Javier, now aware she's special and intends to use her against both Javier *and* Lathandar). Portrait: art/elahnorah.jpg
> [!dm] That patron is plausibly **Alaric** (see [[children-of-lathandar]]).
